title: Weekly Reports Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: January 26, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for January 16, 2026 through January 22, 2026.

The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memo transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering the period of January 16–22, 2026. The reports include public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail dozens of individual requests across police, fire, and general public records categories.
fields.key_stats: The public records log (run date 01/23/2026) shows at least 59 requests logged on January 16, 2026 alone, spanning police reports, fire prevention records, 911/dispatch records, building plans, background requests, body worn camera video, traffic accident reports, and other general public records categories.

projects: Code Enforcement Service Requests Weekly Report
